# tcg-sandbox_card (Data Source)

Fetches a single card from a game set in TCG Sandbox.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `game_id` (String) The ID of the parent game.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the card.
- `set_id` (String) The ID of the set this card belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `attributes` (Map of String) A map of attribute names to their values.
- `card_image_public_url` (String) The public URL of the card image.
- `description` (String) The description of the card.
- `name` (String) The name of the card.
